mano_cua.result_summary: Vue2项目vue-hot-reload-api报错导致页面空白（与mint-ui-305相同问题）。控制台错误：Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '_lifecycleHooks') at exports.install (vue-hot-reload-api/dist/index.js)。#app div为空，Vue应用未初始化。无法测试Cell组件is-link点击交互效果。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page blank due to vue-hot-reload-api error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '_lifecycleHooks'). Same issue as all mint-ui cases.
